configVersion.description:
!IMPORTANT DO NOT TOUCH
Config format version number

baseURL.description: The base URL for the Hypixel API. If null, the default Hypixel API URL will be used
The base URL for the Mowojang API. If null, the default Mowojang API URL will be used

format.description:
The format for messages sent from Discord to Minecraft
Use {username} for the player's username and {message} for the message content

channel.description: Discord channel id. If null, an auto-generated channel will be used
Discord channel id. If null, an auto-generated channel will be used
Discord channel id. If null, an auto-generated channel will be used
Discord channel id. If null, an auto-generated channel will be used

guild.description: Discord channel id. If null, an auto-generated thread will be used

event.description: Discord channel id. If null, an auto-generated thread will be used

error.description: Discord channel id. If null, an auto-generated thread will be used

blacklist.description: Discord channel id. If null, an auto-generated thread will be used

scripts.description: Discord channel id. If null, an auto-generated thread will be used

inactivity.description: Discord channel id. If null, an auto-generated thread will be used

customWords.description: Custom words used for filtering bridge messages

autoAccept.description: Whether new guild members are automatically accepted if they have pass the requirements

requirementsNeededToPass.description: The number of requirements a player must meet to pass

interval.description: How often should the alert be ran (/checked)
How often should the alert be ran (/checked)
How often should the alert be ran (/checked)
How often should the alert be ran (/checked)

messageCooldown.description: The cooldown between alpha player count messages

playerThreshold.description: The player count threshold to trigger an alert

accountsLocation.description: The file path to Minecraft account credentials

token.description: The Discord bot token used to authenticate

staffRole.description: The discord role Id of your staff members

adminUsers.description:
The discord user Ids of any admins
The people who own the bot are automatically included

nickname.description:
The nickname format used for verified users.
See docs/PlayerStatVaribles.md for list of supported variables

removeCommas.description: Whether commas should be removed from generated nicknames

type.description:
The player variable string type required for verification
See docs/PlayerStatVariables.md

value.description: The string value required for this custom verification requirement

type.description:
The player variable string type required for verification
See docs/PlayerStatVariables.md

value.description: The numeric value required for this custom verification requirement

The player variable string type required for verification

value.description: The string value required for this custom verification requirement

type.description:
The player variable string type required for verification
See docs/PlayerStatVariables.md

value.description: The numeric value required for this custom verification requirement

interval.description: How often should all linked users have there roles updated

maxInactivityTime.description: The maximum allowed inactivity time before action is taken

enabled.description: Whether the user being blacklisted with be notified of blacklist changes

shareBlacklister.description: Whether the user who blacklisted someone should be shared in notifications

onJoinRequest.description: Whether join request notifications are enabled

onUserJoinDiscord.description: Whether Discord join notifications are enabled

blockBotAccess.description: Whether blacklisted users are blocked from bot access

reason.description: The reason used when kicking a player from the guild

interval.description: How often stats channels are updated

name.description:
What the channel should be named to
See docs/ChannelStatVariables.md

backupConfigs.description: Whether backup copies of config files should be created

logToFiles.description: Whether log output should be written to files
